content.en:
"We're not dead?"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue were stunned.

They were curious about who had saved them.

"Who is Your Excellency, maybe you will know the ancestor of our Zhao family, the Thorn God?"

Zhao Ziling said.

Of course, he didn't think that the other party would know his ancestor, and he moved out of the Thorn God General just to deter the other party.

A god-level powerhouse, even in the vast continent, is a top powerhouse.

Moreover, the Thorn God General is not the kind of weak God General, but a three-star God General.

"Just a god general, who gave you the Zhao family the courage to act like this within the human race?"

A voice came.

Hearing this voice, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue's eyes widened, this voice was simply too familiar, they had been listening to it every day since they were born.

Isn't that their father's voice?

Wow!

A figure appeared, it was Ye Tian, stepping on the void and walking towards Zhao Ziling step by step.

"Father!"

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue hurriedly shouted.

"I'll talk about your affairs later!" Ye Tiandao.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue shrunk their necks and said in a low voice: "Yes!"

They have always been afraid of their father, even if they have become extraordinary-level powerhouses, they are still a little in awe of ordinary people's fathers.

But they never expected that their father would be a big man, and they were afraid that he had surpassed the transcendent level, and maybe even surpassed the god level.

"I'll give you a chance, you can call for help now, find anyone to save you, and if no one comes to save you, then you die!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

Zhao Ziling trembled and said.

Immediately, he began to summon Zhao Ba, the head of the Zhao family's branch in the Silver Blue Country, and informed Zhao Ba of the situation in Black Wolf City.

After Zhao Ba learned about it, he immediately brought nearly eighty percent of the entire family master and several god-level powerhouses to rush over.

Although the Silver Blue Country is very large, the speed of the transcendent-level and god-level powerhouses is so fast, in less than half an hour, the people of the Zhao family arrived.

Rumble!!!!!!

A large number of transcendental-level auras and several god-level auras permeated, and the people of the entire Black Wolf City trembled.

Even Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue were worried about whether their father could withstand it.

At this time, Xiao Yue appeared beside the two brothers and sisters, and said, "Don't worry, the Zhao family can't help your father, it's useless for anyone to come today!"

"Mother, what kind of cultivation is father?" Ye Xingyue said curiously.

"Soon, you'll know!" Xiao Yue said with a smile.

---------------

"It's the people you threatened our Zhao family?"

Zhao Ba was furious.

In a small place like the Silver Blue Country, there are still people who dare to go against their Zhao family?

How powerful their Zhao family is, they can remove the lord of a country with a word, and they can easily destroy a country, they are a real great family.

And he, Zhao Ba, is not a big figure in the entire vast continent, but with his god-level sixth-order strength, he is enough to be called the top powerhouse in the Silver Blue Country.

"You're not qualified enough!" Ye Tian glanced at Zhao Ba, and a faint coercion acted on Zhao Ba.

In an instant, Zhao Ba fell from the sky and fell to his knees, his whole body cracked, and blood flowed.

"How is that possible?"

Zhao Ba was stunned.

He's a god-level sixth-order powerhouse! The other party didn't even make a move, he actually suppressed him at a glance, what kind of strength is this?

"I'm afraid only the Ancestor will be able to deal with him!"

Zhao Ba thought to himself.

He is the fifth generation of the ancestor, and he believes that the ancestor will definitely come to his rescue.

Immediately, he summoned his ancestor, the Thorn God General.

After the Thorn God General knew about it, he rushed over as fast as he could, and in just a few minutes, he crossed many countries and descended on Black Wolf City.

Rumble!!!!

Above the endless void, a middle-aged man wearing a blue thorn battle armor came across the void, holding a war spear, and confronted Ye Tian.

"Your Excellency, why are you targeting our Zhao family?"

The thorn god will say.

Ye Tian saw that the real ruler of the Zhao family was coming, so he asked: "The Zhao family arrested beautiful women for trafficking, do you know about this matter?"

"Hehe, a strong man who is full of justice?" The Thorn God General said with a smile: "It's just some ordinary people, life is ultimately decades, what is the life or death of these ants to us? Why should Your Excellency offend our Zhao family for a group of ants? Besides, behind our Zhao family is the Cloud Pavilion of the vast continent." Yunxiao Pavilion is not only the overlord-level force of the Vast Continent, but also the stronghold of the Terran Yunxiao Sect in the Vast Continent. I believe that with Your Excellency's strength, you should have heard of the Cloud Sky Sect, right?"

"I'm sorry, I haven't heard of it!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Where does he know about the Yunxiao Sect, it is estimated that it is a force established by some True Monarch or True Ancestor, where does he care about such a small force.

"In other words, do you know the Zhao family's behavior, or even what you instructed?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Not bad!" said the forbidden god.

"Hey!" Ye Tian sighed: "I thought that the human race is very prosperous now, but I didn't expect that a mere Zhao family with only a god general level would do such a thing, you can imagine how many forces are similar to the Zhao family's behavior." "

After speaking, Ye Tian stretched out his right hand and grabbed it gently.

I saw that the forbidden god general had no power to resist and was grabbed by Ye Tianyi in his hands.

Death is coming, and it is not clear where the Thorn God will be, this is definitely the power of the human race, otherwise he would not be crushed easily.

"Seniors spare your life!" the Thorn God begged for mercy.

"Spare your life?" Ye Tian glanced at him deeply, "What qualifications do you have to beg for mercy?"

"I know the Vast True Monarch of the Vast Continent, for the sake of the Vast True Monarch, will you spare me?"

The strength of the Yunxiao Sect is stronger than that of the Vast Continent, but the other party has never heard of the Yunxiao Sect, so he can only move out of the Vast True Monarch.

He believed in the creatures of the Vast Continent, and there was no one who did not know the True Monarch of the Vast Continent.

"If the Vast True Monarch is willing to intercede for you, I can let you go!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Really?"

The god of thorns will be overjoyed.

"Of course!"

Ye Tiandao.

Not far away, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue clenched their fists, they thought that their father was afraid of that vast true monarch.

However, they are also very understanding.

What kind of character is the Vast True Monarch, all the countless countries in the Vast Continent are under the jurisdiction of the Vast True Monarch, and the other party is a mythical figure of the Vast Continent, and has been the true master of the Vast Continent for countless years since the establishment of the Vast Continent.

The Thorn God General hurriedly sent a message to the Cang Vast True Monarch, in fact, he didn't have a deep relationship with the Cang Vast True Monarch, after all, he was just a god general, and the other party was the True Monarch, and the status difference was too much.

But the key is that his Zhao family gave birth to a genius not long ago, and he entered the Yunxiao Sect through the genius selection of the Vast Continent, and he also established the Vast True Monarch.

He believed that the Vast True Monarch should come to save his life for the sake of the genius of the Zhao family.

Sure enough.

Not long after the news was transmitted, the rules on the vast continent manifested into an illusory figure, and it was the true monarch of the vast continent.

"Vast True Monarch, help me!"

The god of thorns shouted loudly.

In Black Wolf City, countless people knelt on the ground one after another, and bowed: "Meet Lord Vast True Monarch!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue also grew up listening to the legend of the Vast True Monarch, and they were about to kneel down subconsciously, but Xiao Yue stopped them.

"You don't need to kneel, he's not qualified to let you kneel. Remember, you are our sons and daughters, and we are the only ones who have the right to make you kneel, understand?" Xiao Yue reminded the two children.

"Yes, Mother!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue nodded slightly, but their eyes were fixed on the Vast True Monarch in the void above, for fear that such an act would cause the Vast True Monarch to be angry.

"Vast Zhenjun, do you still know me?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

The Vast True Monarch looked at Ye Tian, his pupils shrank sharply, and he trembled all over: "I've seen Lord Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor!"

"You know what, I'm disappointed!"

Ye Tian said.

As soon as these words came out, the Vast True Monarch knelt down directly, and he hurriedly asked, "Lord Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, what happened?"

"This person is the thorny god general of the Zhao family, the Zhao family continues to arrest beautiful women for sale, and he said that you will keep him. I want to ask you, are you willing to protect him?" Ye Tian asked.

The Vast True Monarch can't wait to kill the Thorn God General, isn't this a trap for him?

"Lord Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, I really have nothing to do with this person, I've just met once!" explained the Vast True Monarch.

Below.

Countless people in Black Wolf City were dumbfounded, this is still the master of the Vast Continent, how can he be the same as a servant.

And the Thorn God General was also dumbfounded, his biggest backer was also afraid of Ye Tian.

He hadn't heard of the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, because his level was too low and too low, but he knew what a True Ancestor was.

He had offended a true ancestor!

"My father is the true ancestor!!

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue were shocked.

What is the concept of True Ancestor, that is the top existence of the human race!
